title: Space Galaxy Party Supplies Tableware Set, Includes Plates, Napkins, Cups, for 20 Guests Galaxy Outer Space Theme Birthday Party Decoration (Serve 20)
features: Space Galaxy Birthday Decorations: 20 9'' dinner plates, 20 7'' dessert plates, 20 9 oz cups, napkins *20, enough tableware for 20 guests.
Material: Plates, cups, and napkins are made of environmentally friendly biodegradable paper, food-grade, non-toxic, High-quality material.

Attractive Design: Our space party tableware is designed with galaxy constellations, star patterns, moons, and shooting stars scattered across the sky. Very beautiful and dazzling, full of mysterious space theme party atmosphere, adding a party atmosphere to your party.
Easy to Clean: Disposable paper reduces clean-up time so you can enjoy more time with friends and family， And leave an unforgettable memory with your friends and family.

Wide Application: Galaxy-themed party supplies are ideal for starry sky theme parties, baby showers, birthdays, solar system theme parties, carnival parties, space theme parties, summer holiday events, space movie theme parties, school space explore theme activities, and more, especially for galaxy fans. satisfying people's curiosity and yearning for space.
description: This is a set of fun and rich space galaxy party decorations, let's start enjoying the party feast. Our space galaxy-themed party supplies set includes the following: 20 9" plates 20 7" plates 20 9oz cups 20 3-ply napkins
